title: Traceability Engine: validate, coverage y report
wave: Ola 2 — Trazabilidad SDLC ejecutable y baseline industrial mínima cerrada

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-26 adds a dependency-free, read-only traceability engine over existing local SDLC documents. It introduces no external dependency, provider, network call, persistent storage backend or destructive action.

pass_criteria: Detects requirements without test/eval evidence when applicable.
Reports gaps as actionable warning findings.
block_criteria: Recommended gaps block execution in this initial version.
The command fails when optional documents are absent.
A new dependency is added without ADR.
risks: Coverage is explicit and does not use semantic reasoning.
Warnings are not blocking quality gates yet.
Rule severities should become configurable in future phases.
Evidence extraction from prose is intentionally limited.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-27 — Architecture/code drift inicial y cierre de Baseline Industrial Mínima
